fields.name: What_is_happening_to_this_asset
fields.fieldText: What is happening to this asset

value.stringValue: Which asset is now being disposed?

fields.name: What_is_happening_to_this_asset_move
fields.fieldText: What is happening to this asset?

value.stringValue: What is the asset changing to?
What site is the asset going to?

fields.name: Where_is_it_going_to_be_stored
fields.fieldText: Where is it going to be stored?

fields.name: confirmDisposalsText
fields.fieldText: By continuing you are confirming that the below disposals are correct.

fields.name: confirmMovesText
fields.fieldText: By continuing you are confirming that the below moves are correct.

fields.name: assetCheckTextDisposals
fields.fieldText: Please select any assets which may have changed or are no longer being disposed of.

fields.name: assetCheckTextMoved
fields.fieldText: Please select any assets which may have changed or are no longer being moved.
